author: mark
text:
Kill the env::remove_var("HOME") that flaked state_repo tests

dirs_base_no_home removed HOME from the process environment to drive dirs_base's no-HOME branch. env::remove_var is process-global: while HOME was unset, concurrent tests shelling out to git ran without the developer's ~/.gitconfig identity, and state_repo's seed commit hit 'Author identity unknown' — failing ~1 run in 3 under full-parallel cargo test.

Split dirs_base into a one-line env-reading wrapper and a pure dirs_base_for(Option<&str>, &str); the no-HOME branch is now tested by passing None, with no global mutation. The state_repo tests were victims, not the cause. Follow-up bl-ad4b tracks the same pattern in the plugin PATH tests.
